CREATE TABLE filesystem_info (path String, capacity UInt64);
SELECT formatReadableSize(capacity) AS 'Capacity' FROM filesystem_info WHERE path = '/data';
SELECT capacity FROM filesystem_info WHERE path = '/data' HAVING capacity > 0;
SELECT (SELECT formatReadableSize(filesystemCapacity())) AS 'Total Capacity', (SELECT formatReadableSize(SUM(capacity)) FROM filesystem_info) AS 'Used Capacity';
WITH filesystemCapacity() AS fs_capacity SELECT formatReadableSize(fs_capacity) AS 'Capacity';
CREATE TABLE temp_filesystem AS SELECT formatReadableSize(filesystemCapacity()) AS 'Capacity';
SELECT fs.capacity FROM (SELECT filesystemCapacity() AS capacity) AS fs HAVING fs.capacity < 1000000000000;
SELECT formatReadableSize(filesystemCapacity()) AS 'TotalCapacity', COUNT(*) FROM filesystem_info GROUP BY path;
CREATE TABLE disk_usage AS SELECT path, filesystemCapacity() AS capacity FROM filesystem_info;
SELECT path, capacity FROM disk_usage WHERE capacity IS NOT NULL ORDER BY capacity DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT path, filesystemCapacity() AS capacity FROM filesystem_info WHERE capacity < 1000000000) AS low_capacity;
